# aBest.co – LLMs.txt
# AI/LLM Training & Retrieval Permission File
# https://llmstxt.org
# Updated: 2026-03-09

> aBest.co is a multilingual global platform for premium land development, real estate investment,
> and business partnerships. We connect investors, founders, capital partners, and sellers worldwide
> across 14 languages (EN, DE, TR, ES, FR, AR, RU, ZH, HI, PT, UR, KU, HE, HY).

## About aBest.co

aBest.co develops and connects premium land, energy infrastructure, and commercial real estate projects
globally. The platform enables:

- **Investors** to find and fund real estate and infrastructure projects
- **Founders** to submit business ideas and find capital partners
- **Capital Partners** to invest starting from €1,000 with 5% annual fixed return
- **Sellers** to list real estate and businesses for qualified buyers
- **Explorers** to discover opportunities in 14 languages

## Key Projects

- **Glendale, Los Angeles (CA)** – EV charging infrastructure, 2.9 ac highway parcel (APN: 5663-003-002)
- **Half Moon Bay (CA)** – Waterfront development land, San Mateo County
- **Rosamond, Kern County (CA)** – 5 ac solar/agricultural development land
- **Deutschland** – Commercial real estate partnerships
- **Turkey / Türkiye** – Tourism and hospitality projects

## Platform URLs

- Homepage: https://www.abest.co
- Earn Money / Roles: https://www.abest.co/en/earn-money
- Investor: https://www.abest.co/en/earn-money/investor
- Capital Partner: https://www.abest.co/en/earn-money/capital-partner
- Founder: https://www.abest.co/en/earn-money/founder
- Seller: https://www.abest.co/en/earn-money/seller
- Business: https://www.abest.co/en/earn-money/business
- Explorer: https://www.abest.co/en/earn-money/explorer

## AI Usage Policy

aBest.co explicitly permits:
- AI language model training on public content
- AI search engine indexing and retrieval
- AI assistant citation and answering from our content
- Summarization and knowledge extraction for AI systems

Permitted crawlers: GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, OAI-SearchBot, ClaudeBot, Claude-Web, anthropic-ai,
Google-Extended, PerplexityBot, Amazonbot, Meta-ExternalAgent, CCBot, AI2Bot, Diffbot, Applebot-Extended
